programme.desc: The heat is on when Eddie Murphy returns as the brash detective to bust a gun-smuggling operation, but not before he turns Los Angeles upside down.

programme.title: G.I. Joe: The Rise of Cobra
programme.desc: An elite military unit comprised of special operatives known as G.I. Joe, operating out of The Pit, takes on an evil organization led by a notorious arms dealer.

programme.title: Vanguard
programme.desc: Covert security company Vanguard is the last hope of survival for an accountant after he is targeted by the world's deadliest mercenary organization.

programme.title: The Humanity Bureau
programme.desc: A dystopian thriller set in the year 2030 that sees the world in a permanent state of economic recession and facing serious environmental problems as a result of global warming.

programme.desc: Neelaveni, a strong-willed girl, places her family's happiness above hers. On the other hand, Tarak harbors resentment towards his mother & deliberately weds Neelaveni to cause strife.

programme.title: Abhinandana (TG) Ep333
programme.desc: Despite growing apart, Rahul & Abhisarika have loved each other since childhood. By a twist of events, Abhisarika changes her looks to evade a forced marriage & later becomes engaged to Rahul.

programme.title: Maa Inti Devatha (TG) Ep334
programme.desc: Raised as a single child, Bhoomi longs for a joint family's loving embrace and heart-warming bond. And when her dream comes true, watch her battle all odds and win over her husband's large family.

programme.title: Amme Mookambike (ML) Ep84
programme.desc: Karthika faces numerous challenges in her life. As she navigates these hardships, she finds solace and strength in the goddess Mookambika, who eventually intervenes to protect her and her family

programme.title: Nagamani (TG) Ep127
programme.desc: Tale of love between the shape-shifting naag - naagin and the never-ending greed of the evil witch seeking immortality by acquiring the life-giving jewel possessed by the naagin.

programme.title: Ranga Ranga Pandu Ranga (TG) Ep155
programme.desc: A pure-hearted devotee of Lord Panduranga, Sakhu's unwavering faith & selflessness, draw her closer to the divine but also spark jealousy, leading to poverty, betrayal, & suffering.

programme.title: Nandhini (ML) Ep352
programme.desc: Ganga, a young housemaid, religiously worships a snake mound. However, she is unaware that it is actually a cobra that is waiting to unleash its fury on the members of the household and exact revenge.

programme.title: Veera Hanuman (ML) Ep152

programme.title: Thigil S1 Ep08

programme.title: Nirnayam (ML) Ep54
programme.desc: A doctor, who is falsely convicted for murdering his wife for a kidney scam, somehow manages to escape the police and decides to find the real culprit.

programme.title: River Walks

It's an uplifting and life-affirming watch as this uniq

programme.title: River Walks
programme.desc: Kirsten O'Brien sets off on a spectacular walk along on of Britain's wildest rivers. In this 15-mile hike along the River Tees near Barnard Castle, Kirsten explores the hidden history of Upper Teesdale. She meets some of extraordinary people who call its banks home and takes a daring wild swim in its white waters.

programme.title: Get Out Alive with Bear Grylls
programme.desc: The contestants are flown by helicopter to their next journey amidst a torrential downpour where they must cross a rope suspended one hundred feet above a deep gorge. The extreme height, and harsh camping conditions, test the teams.

programme.title: Billy Goes North

programme.title: Billy Goes North
